description_long: This mosque features a grand central structure with a large, ribbed dome at its core, flanked by two smaller domes and surrounded by a series of arched colonnades. The main building is complemented by two tall, slender minarets with pointed conical roofs, each adorned with small, windowed turrets near their tops. The exterior is finished in a pale, marble-like texture with subtle greenish patina on the domes and minaret roofs, giving it an aged, historic appearance. The mosque's base is circular, with open, columned galleries that wrap around the main prayer hall, providing both structural support and aesthetic elegance. The minarets are positioned asymmetrically, with one standing apart from the main structure and the other integrated into the building's rear. There are no visible Islamic geometric patterns or Arabic calligraphy, and the overall design suggests an Ottoman-inspired architectural style with its domes, arches, and tall minarets.
description: A grand mosque with a central ribbed dome, two tall minarets, and arched colonnades, finished in pale marble with greenish domes. The design is reminiscent of Ottoman architecture, with elegant galleries and pointed minaret roofs.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, central dome, and two flanking colonnaded wings, with both minarets visible—one attached and one freestanding.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the rear integration of one minaret into the main structure and the layered arrangement of domes and galleries.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the tall minarets dominating the skyline, with the circular base and open galleries wrapping around the structure.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the freestanding minaret and the intricate, open colonnades, as well as the layered domes and roof details.
attribute_dome: Three domes are visible: one large central ribbed dome and two smaller domes, all with a greenish patina and rounded shape, placed atop the main structure and flanking wings.
attribute_minaret: Two minarets are present: one tall, slender, and freestanding with a pointed conical roof, and another integrated into the rear of the main building, both taller than the main dome and featuring small windowed turrets.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman-inspired, characterized by large central domes, tall slender minarets, arched colonnades, and a marble-like exterior.
